title: What can carry that weight are language and actions that reflect what
annotation: What can carry that weight are language and actions that reflect what design has always been at its best: goals-aligned, research-informed, constraints-aware, and outcomes-focused. We can get curious: What outcome feels improved? What about this option feels more brand-aligned? What feels more successful in this? What feels more aligned to the users needs?

og.title: Evolving Design Language in the AI Era: From Good to Great
og.description: Explore how the AI era reshapes design language, emphasizing objective critique over subjective opinions for successful outcomes.
